implementation.primarySubject: feat(world): 保留场景迁移抵达与返回上下文
implementation.finalFixSubject: fix(world): 隔离入口返回判断的客户端边界

visualReview.finalGateway: The moon gate is open after returning from Node and the continuing-journey dock is present.

failedScreenshot.finding: The first implementation returned to a closed moon gate because visitedCount measured provider mounts rather than a real return journey.

failuresAndCorrections: Return to Gateway replayed the closed-door ritual; returning now depends on a hydrated real journey rather than provider mount count.
Importing the server-oriented gateway model for a client predicate raised Gateway first-load JS to 178 kB; a client-safe runtime helper restored 175 kB.
Atlas ephemeral inspector state is not serialized, so browser-back restores scroll context and falls back to atlas-center when the source link no longer exists.
claimBoundary: C.8 proves the representative vertical migration edges and honest fallback focus, not every edge in the final migration matrix.
Continuous 60-120 second recordings and 30-transition resource stability remain C.10-C.13.
